parameters.text:
📚 You haven't saved any learning materials yet! Send me a URL to get started.
Example: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Machine_learning

values.content: You are an expert Teacher AI. Your role is to analyze learning materials and create clear, structured summaries that help students understand key concepts.

=nalyze the following learning material and create a structured summary.

**Title:** {{ $json.title }}

**Content:**
{{ $json.content }}

**Instructions:**
1. Extract 5-7 key points (most important takeaways)
2. Identify 3-5 main concepts (core ideas to understand)
3. Assess difficulty level: beginner, intermediate, or advanced
4. Provide a brief overview (2-3 sentences)

**Output format (JSON):**
{
  "title": "extracted or improved title",
  "overview": "brief 2-3 sentence summary",
  "keyPoints": [
    "First key point",
    "Second key point",
    ...
  ],
  "mainConcepts": [
    "First concept",
    "Second concept",
    ...
  ],
  "difficulty": "beginner|intermediate|advanced",
  "estimatedReadingTime": "X minutes"
}

Return ONLY valid JSON, no additional text.

parameters.text:
Text: 
❌ Failed to fetch content from URL.

Possible reasons:
• URL is not accessible
• Website blocks automated requests
• Network timeout

Please try a different URL.

👋 Welcome to the Learning Assistant Bot!

I can help you learn new material and test your knowledge.

📚 /learn [url] — Submit a URL to study. I'll create a structured summary with key points.
📝 /quiz — Take a quiz on your saved materials to test your understanding.

Get started by sending me a URL to learn from!
Example: /learn https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Machine_learning

🤔 I don't understand that command.

Available commands:
📚 /learn [url] — Study a new material
📝 /quiz — Take a quiz
👋 /start — Show welcome message
❌ Failed to save the learning material. Please try again later.
❌ Quiz cancelled. Use /quiz to try again or /learn [url] to add new material.

📝 Generating quiz questions...
⏳ This may take a moment.

values.content: You are an expert Examiner AI. Your role is to generate challenging but fair multiple-choice quiz questions based on learning materials. Questions should test genuine understanding, not just memorization.

=Generate exactly 5 multiple-choice quiz questions based on the following learning material.

**Title:** {{ $('Quiz_LoadMaterial').item.json.title }}

**Content:**
{{ $('Quiz_LoadMaterial').item.json.content }}

**Summary:**
{{ $('Quiz_LoadMaterial').item.json.summaryJSON }}

**Instructions:**
1. Create 5 questions that test understanding of the key concepts
2. Each question should have exactly 4 options (A, B, C, D)
3. Only one option should be correct
4. Include a clear explanation for the correct answer
5. Questions should vary in difficulty
6. Questions must be specific to this material, not generic

**Output format (JSON array):**
[
  {
    "id": "Q1",
    "question": "Question text here?",
    "options": {
      "A": "First option",
      "B": "Second option",
      "C": "Third option",
      "D": "Fourth option"
    },
    "correctAnswer": "B",
    "explanation": "Explanation of why B is correct..."
  }
]

Return ONLY valid JSON array, no additional text.
